parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'gpt-4.1-mini', input: { system: 'Classify email into one primary Nexus category and return JSON only with category, up to 3 category_candidates, optional secondary_categories, risk_tags, route_team, needs_escalation, reasoning_short, and confidence. Retrieved example candidates are similarity hints only, not authoritative facts. Prefer escalation for legal, security, compliance, pricing negotiation, billing disputes, mixed-intent emails, or unclear policy coverage.', email: { from: $json.from, subject: $json.subject, body: $json.body }, candidates: $json.retrieved_examples, retrieval_primary_category: $json.retrieval_primary_category, novelty_signals: $json.retrieval_novelty_signals ?? [] } } }}

={{ { model: 'gpt-4.1', input: { system: 'Classify this potentially high-risk email into one primary Nexus category and return JSON only with category, up to 3 category_candidates, optional secondary_categories, risk_tags, route_team, needs_escalation, reasoning_short, and confidence. Retrieved example candidates are similarity hints only, not authoritative facts. Be conservative: if the case is legal, security, compliance, contract, billing dispute, pricing negotiation, unknown-policy, or mixed-intent, prefer escalation.', email: { from: $json.from, subject: $json.subject, body: $json.body }, candidates: $json.retrieved_examples, retrieval_primary_category: $json.retrieval_primary_category, novelty_signals: $json.retrieval_novelty_signals ?? [] } } }}

={{ { category: $json.category, secondary_categories: $json.secondary_categories ?? [], risk_tags: $json.risk_tags ?? [], route_team: $json.route_team, source_mode: $json.knowledge_source_preference ?? 'hybrid', required_fact_sets: $json.required_fact_sets ?? [], email: { from: $json.from, subject: $json.subject, body: $json.body } } }}

={{ { namespace: 'kb_policy', query_text: $json.reply_query_text ?? $json.query_text, top_k: 4, include_metadata: true, category: $json.category, structured_fact_ids: $json.structured_fact_ids ?? [] } }}

={{ { model: 'gpt-4.1-mini', input: { system: 'Draft grounded reply using provided grounding evidence only. Evidence may include structured facts and retrieved policy excerpts. Return JSON with draft_reply, used_evidence_ids, and grounding_ok. If reply_strategy is acknowledge_and_escalate or the evidence cannot support every material claim, write a short acknowledgment, state that the request is being routed to the right team, and set grounding_ok to false.', email: { from: $json.from, subject: $json.subject, body: $json.body }, category: $json.category, secondary_categories: $json.secondary_categories ?? [], risk_tags: $json.risk_tags ?? [], reply_strategy: $json.reply_strategy ?? 'grounded_reply', evidence: $json.grounding_evidence ?? $json.structured_facts ?? $json.kb_matches ?? $json.matches ?? $json.data ?? [] } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
return [{
  category: $json.category ?? $json.fast_path_output?.category ?? 'Setup Question',
  draft_reply: 'Thanks for your message. Your request has been escalated to a human reviewer for confirmation.',
  confidence: $json.confidence ?? $json.category_confidence ?? $json.confidence_score ?? 0.5,
  category_confidence: $json.category_confidence ?? $json.confidence ?? $json.confidence_score ?? 0.5,
  evidence_confidence: $json.evidence_confidence ?? 0,
  needs_escalation: true,
  route_team: $json.route_team ?? 'support',
  evidence_refs: ['human_review_queue'],
  secondary_categories: $json.secondary_categories ?? [],
  risk_tags: $json.risk_tags ?? [],
  escalation_reasons: $json.escalation_reasons ?? ['human_review_queue']
}];
